Spinning sprinkler casting rainbow arcs across wet lawn, garden hose snaking through clover patches in afternoon sun.
Orange popsicle melting into sticky puddle on hot concrete, wooden stick fallen beside chalk-drawn hopscotch grid.
Above-ground pool with aluminum ladder, blue inflatable raft drifting slowly across chlorine-bright water surface.
Hand-painted lemonade stand sign leaning against card table, pitcher sweating condensation, stack of waxy paper cups.
Purple banana-seat bike sprawled on front lawn, rainbow handlebar streamers still, playing card clothes-pinned to spokes.
Ice cream truck menu board showing faded cartoon characters, metal serving window propped open, napkin dispenser visible.
Mason jar on porch rail with punctured lid, single firefly glowing yellow-green inside as twilight deepens.
Yellow Slip 'N Slide stretched across grass, dark wet streak down center, garden hose spraying at top.
Wooden screen door half-open, summer moths circling yellow porch bulb, mesh casting shadow on concrete step.
Round Weber grill with charcoal smoke drifting, picnic table covered in red-checkered vinyl cloth, paper plate stack.
Treehouse platform visible through oak leaves, rope ladder dangling, comic books and flashlight scattered on plywood floor.
Metal playground slide gleaming in late sun, rubber swings casting long shadows across wood chip ground.
Tackle box open on grassy bank, red-and-white bobber floating on still pond, orange cooler beside folding chair.
Drive-in speaker hanging on station wagon window, giant screen glowing pink in dusk, empty lot spaces visible.
Basketball hoop mounted on garage door, pink chalk hopscotch fading on driveway, street washed in golden light.
Sprinkler head shooting water spiral across dandelion-dotted lawn, coiled green hose trailing toward spigot on house.
Grape popsicle wrapper crumpled beside purple drip stains, ants already gathering on sun-baked sidewalk square.
Pool noodles floating in blue water, white diving board casting shadow, wet footprints evaporating on hot concrete.
Glass lemonade pitcher half-empty with ice cubes and lemon slices, dime and nickel lying on wooden stand.
Red BMX bike lying on its side, kickstand bent upward, front wheel still spinning slowly in sunshine.
Ice cream truck dashboard with musical box visible, spinning cone sign on roof, side window menu showing prices.
Three mason jars lined up on windowsill at dusk, fireflies inside creating intermittent yellow-green pulses of light.
Slip 'N Slide's yellow plastic gleaming wet, garden hose connector dripping, flattened grass path leading to end.
Screen door's spring stretched tight, moths and june bugs dotting mesh, porch light attracting swirling insect cloud.
Charcoal briquettes glowing orange in Weber grill, metal tongs on picnic table beside stack of hamburger buns.
Wooden ladder nailed to tree trunk, treehouse doorway dark above, tin roof visible through summer-green canopy.
Playground merry-go-round stopped in golden light, metal bars casting spoke shadows, scattered wood chips beneath.
Fishing rod propped on forked stick, line disappearing into lily pads, red bobber motionless on glassy water.
Drive-in lot speaker poles marching toward screen showing cartoons, orange dusk sky behind silhouetted movie image.
Portable basketball hoop's shadow stretching across street, abandoned skateboard nearby, pink chalk hearts on asphalt.
Oscillating sprinkler mid-sweep, water droplets catching rainbow light, wet grass blades sparkling in late afternoon sun.
Blue popsicle stick embedded in melted puddle, sticky trail leading to storm drain, cicada shell nearby.
Above-ground pool wall showing waterline, foam kickboard floating, metal ladder rails hot from hours of sunshine.
Cardboard lemonade sign with backwards 'E', plastic pitcher with condensation rings on card table surface.
Banana seat bike with sissy bar lying in grass, chrome fender reflecting sky, tire tread pattern pressed into lawn.
Ice cream truck's interior visible through service window, stainless steel soft-serve machine, boxes of frozen treats.
Mason jar tipped on its side in grass, lid holes visible, firefly escaped into violet dusk air.
Slip 'N Slide section folded over itself, pool of water collecting, wet grass clippings stuck to yellow plastic.
Screen door frame casting rectangular shadow on porch boards, dead moths accumulated at light fixture base below.
BBQ grill lid propped open, smoke wisps rising, red cooler and folding chairs arranged around checkered tablecloth.
Treehouse platform with No Girls Keep Out sign, stack of MAD magazines, binoculars hanging from nail.
Playground swingset chains twisted together, empty seats swaying slightly, golden light streaming through chain-link fence.
Worm container open beside tackle box, fishing line tangled on grass, bobber and sinker laid on cooler lid.
Drive-in screen showing previews in deepening dusk, speaker wire trailing from pole, gravel lot mostly empty.
Street hockey net tipped over on asphalt, chalk goal crease visible, basketball rolling slowly toward curb.
Sprinkler creating expanding circles of spray, rainbow visible in mist, flip-flops abandoned on wet walkway.
Twin popsicle sticks in melted red-orange puddle, wrapper fluttering against curb, ants forming exploratory line.
Pool floatie shaped like duck drifting past ladder, goggles on deck, chlorine smell hanging in humid air.
Lemonade stand's change jar with quarters visible, melting ice in pitcher, hand-drawn 25¢ sign taped crookedly.
Bike with banana seat resting on garage kickstand, reflectors catching sun, training wheels long removed and gone.
